system.description: You study Syrneth ruins and explore the lost parts of Terra.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you turn an artifact of value over to a university, museum, or a publicly displayed site.

system.description: You were born into the nobility of your home country and regularly attend the courts.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you prove there is more to nobility than expensive clothes and attending court.

system.description: You enlisted in the army and soon found yourself in a command position.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you seize command during a moment of intense violence or extreme danger.

system.description: You work tirelessly to create objects of beauty.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you make a sacrifice in the hope of making Théah a more beautiful place.

system.description: You stalked the shadows as a specter of silent death in return for bloody coin, but no more.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you go out of your way to avoid the death of an adversary or outright refuse a course of action because it could result in another person’s death.

system.description: You are a mounted warrior and part of your Nation’s esteemed cavalry.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you apply your skills in horse riding to an uncommon situation.

system.description: You regularly attend the courts of your home Nation and act as a diplomat to foreign courts.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you turn the tide of violence with charm and flair.

system.description: You work tirelessly to create objects of function.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you use everyday crafting skills to solve a problem deemed too complex for such a simple solution.

system.description: You break unjust laws to achieve what you believe is the greater good.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you break the law in the pursuit of a noble endeavor.

system.description: You work to heal the sick and tend to the wounded.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you tend to the injuries of a Villain or the innocents harmed by a Villain.

system.description: You have devoted your life to mastering the blade.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you resort to the edge of your blade to defend a noble ideal.

system.description: You are concerned with applying scientific knowledge, mathematics, and ingenuity to develop solutions for technical, social and commercial problems
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you use your technological savvy to solve a problem.

system.description: You live to see the farthest reaches that Terra has to offer.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you set your eyes upon a sight few, if any, Théans have ever seen before.

system.description: You were raised on a small farm, working to survive, and have never known the life of adventure.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you solve a complex problem in a simple, tried and true method from back on the farm.

system.description: You sleep under the stars and hunt your meals with your own two hands.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you use your hunter’s acumen to save someone from danger.

system.description: You seduce others for fun and profit.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you resolve a conflict with seduction or sexual wiles.

system.description: You sell your skills in battle to the highest bidder.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you choose to ply your trade for a reason that’s worth more to you than money.

system.description: You travel the countryside to sell your wares in market or port.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you sell an item for far less than it’s worth to someone who desperately needs it.

system.description: You enlisted in the navy and worked your way into the command crew of a ship.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you put the needs of the crew ahead of the needs of the mission.

system.description: You lost your parents at a young age and have been forced to look out for yourself.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you put yourself in danger to ensure someone else doesn’t have to be alone.

system.description: You work tirelessly to create an experience of beauty.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you use your crowd-pleasing skills for something more than making a few coins.

system.description: You sail the seas, taking what you need, and providing true freedom to all who accept the call.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you make a personal sacrifice to ensure the freedom of another.

system.description: You serve a higher cause with every living breath you take.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you set aside the rhetoric and take action to practice the virtues you preach.

system.description: You teach others at a prestigious learning institution.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you use knowledge from an obscure text to solve a complicated problem.

system.description: You rely on your hands and feet to solve all the violent problems in your life.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you drop what you’re holding to fight with fists regardless of your opponent's weapon.

system.description: You serve aboard a ship taking care of all the things the other sailors ignore.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you solve a problem for your crew.

system.description: You serve no country or master, but the ship and your crew are all the family you need.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you put aside your personal desires to ensure the safety and comfort of your allies.

system.description: You dedicate yourself to learning and documenting all the wonders of Terra.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you put yourself in harm’s way in pursuit of knowledge.

system.description: You work for another doing whatever your master’s bidding may be.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you put yourself in danger to assist another character with a difficult task.

system.description: You command a crew and sail the seas for whatever banner you fly.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you’re the last one in your crew to safety.

system.description: You know how to fight—and how to kill—and you have made a life doing so under banners and for lords.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you stick to the plan regardless of the danger to yourself.

system.description: You serve your Nation by infiltrating its enemies and securing their secrets.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you take a great risk to uncover a secret.

system.description: You tell the old tales, the stories of Legends, and ensure the soul of Avalon is never forgotten.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you solve a problem by following an example set by a Legend.

system.description: You are imbued with the legendary magic of the Knights of King Elilodd.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you uphold an ideal of knightly virtue in a way that gets you into trouble.

system.description: You have been given a charter to sink any ships that are enemies to the Crown of Avalon.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you defeat the enemies of the Crown of Avalon.

system.description: You have been tasked by the Crown of Avalon to keep the peace among the Isles.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you ensure the stability of the Glamour Isles Unification.

system.description: You are a reformed Objectionist who seeks to “purify” the Church of Avalon from all Vaticine practices
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you expose corruption, hypocrisy, or ineffectiveness within the Vaticine Church.

system.description: You hold the highest honor bestowed by Aosdána, a state-supported association of Inish creative artists.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you put yourself in harm’s way to protect the artists of Théah.

system.description: You are a storyteller and historian, versed in the laws of your people and their ancient ways.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you enforce the ancient laws of your people.

system.description: You sought long and hard until you unlocked the mystery of alchemical creation.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you improve another Théan's life through Alchemy.

system.description: You are a cousin to the Archæologist but focused on the people you find and not the ruins they left behind.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you solve a problem for a group of strangers.

system.description: You have dedicated your life to the understanding of the Sword, not just its function.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you best a trained duelist at her own game.

system.description: You are a master scholar of the Vaticine Church and member of the Ordo Doctorem Mirabilis.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you give of yourself to demonstrate the warmth and compassion of the Vaticine Church.

system.description: You are a master of Hexenwerk, the sorcery of the dead.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you go out of your way to ensure that the dead stay dead.

system.description: You survived the War of the Cross and carry the scars of many battles on your flesh.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you choose to fight to defend the defenseless or prevent destruction.

system.description: You know that there are unnatural creatures stalking your homeland, and you’ve sworn to destroy them.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you choose to hunt down an inhuman creature so it will never hurt anyone ever again.

system.description: You are one of the many brothers of Eisen dedicated to fair trade and equal shares.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you take from the rich to give to the poor.

system.description: You are, literally, a favorite courtier of the King of Montaigne.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you leverage the King's favor to solve a problem.

system.description: You are sworn to protect the King of Montaigne and your fellow musketeers until your death.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you take a serious injury to protect your comrades or King.

system.description: You have pledged yourself to seeing your country freed from the tyranny of the aristocracy.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you make a personal sacrifice for the sake of liberty.

system.description: You have mastered the art of Porté, the magical opening of doorways.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you close a Blessure that a Villain ripped open.

system.description: You act as an advisor to the entire voting body of the Commonwealth.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you insist on democracy when it would be advantageous for you to not take a vote.

system.description: You fled to the Commonwealth seeking asylum after Golden Liberty was declared.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when something from your past comes back to haunt you.

system.description: You serve in the proudest of cavalry regiments, an elite unit in the Sarmatian military.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you and your steed plunge headfirst into a battle or conflict, heedless of the danger.

system.description: You met the Devil on the road, tricked him, and gained his powers at your command.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you use something evil for good.

system.description: You live in the Eastern steppes of Ussura, a place with a proud heritage of horsemanship and warfare.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you leave behind something important so you can travel light.

system.description: You travel Théah to bring innovations home to modernize the old country.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you risk life and limb to secure a piece of advanced technology.

system.description: You have been touched by Matushka and granted great power at a terrible price.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you teach someone a lesson in a way that would make Matushka proud.

system.description: You sail the frozen seas of Ussura with spears and boats tracking the most dangerous sea life.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you face a creature that could swallow a man whole.

system.description: You fight with a nearly uncontrollable, trance-like fury.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you let the Game Master choose your character's next action.

system.description: You serve on the Vendel League and manage Guilds in some capacity.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you use the vast resources of the Vendel League for something more noble than profit.

system.description: You give honor to the ancient Vestenmennavenjar heritage of naval combat, raiding, and pillaging.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when put yourself in danger in order to ensure your place of honor at the Allfather’s table.

system.description: You interpret the mysteries of the bonfire and the bones, sharing tales of glory and defeat.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you use your knowledge as a Seidr to help another Hero to solve a problem or thwart a Villain.

system.description: You have sworn to protect someone else and will always be at his side.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you put yourself in danger to defend the life of the person you’ve sworn to protect.

system.description: You work as an “advisor” to a Merchant Prince.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you take a great risk to protect someone else’s secret.

system.description: You travel the world on behalf of a Merchant Prince.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you use non-Théan items or knowledge to solve a problem.

system.description: Note: Only women Heroes can choose this Background. You can sense the strands of Fate, twisting and controlling them to your will… but not without a price.
system.quirk: Earn a Hero Point when you commit to a dangerous course of action that you believe is destiny.
